Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development is present. Represented by Raven Dunn.
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendant Shedrick Milton is present.
Attorney Barbara Lam appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of JUL-11-2016 is vacated. (501)
